sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ciamna kip thupha Zeisu kei a
Pasian vaanglian bang hong ciamsak na pha
Kha Siangtho a suak si a sawpsa

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka gen gen ding hi ka sasa ding
Hong Honpa phatna sun ni loh in
Ka gengen ding hi ka sasa ding
Hong Honpa phatna sun ni loh in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Thuman'na cing a cing hi nuamna
Ka mitkha'n ka mu hi lianpi nuamna
Vantung mite in ka bil sungah
Hehpihna itna hong gen ka za

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Thuman'na cing hi tawlnga khin hi
Hong Honpa sung lungnuamin ka om hi
Ama hoihna itna hong dim hi
